jd_text: ESMOS Recruitment is seeking a Head of Marketing to lead and oversee all marketing functions for our client based in Dubai. The role involves driving brand strategy, planning and executing campaigns, and managing a team to deliver results across multiple channels. Key Responsibilities: • Lead marketing strategy and campaigns across corporate and product levels. • Manage branding, PR, digital, and content marketing efforts. • Conduct market research and competitor analysis. • Build and maintain relationships with stakeholders and suppliers. • Oversee and mentor the marketing team. Requirements: • 5+ years’ experience in marketing leadership, ideally in events, media, or B2B sectors. • Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field (MBA preferred). • Strong knowledge of marketing best practices and digital strategy. • Excellent leadership, organizational, and networking skills. • Proactive, detail-oriented, and innovative approach. Salary is up to 35K AED. ***ONLY Shortlisted candidates will be contacted***
